shadows.name: interactive-glow
shadows.purpose: Soft, warm lift for cards and buttons on hover.

shadows.name: cart-lift
shadows.purpose: High-impact lift for the primary action floating button.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action button used for 'Add to Cart' and 'Confirm Order'.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #8b4513; color: #faf9f7; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-weight: bold; font-family: sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6a340e; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.2); }

components.name: Menu Card
components.html:
Classic Espresso

Rich & bold single shot
components.css: .ds-card-menu { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(60, 36, 21, 0.1); transition: all 0.2s; } .ds-card-img { width: 100%; height: 120px; background: #eee; } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px; } .ds-card-menu:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.08); }

narrative.overview: The design balances modern luxury with everyday convenience, creating a welcoming mood that highlights premium quality without feeling intimidating.
dos: Do use generous white space between product groups.
Do provide high contrast for all functional text.
donts: Don't use heavy drop shadows or outdated gradients.
Don't use side-stripe borders as a primary way to indicate status or hierarchy.
